title: ISO 13485 Quality Management System Scope Record
description: Records the scope of a manufacturer's QMS as it relates to a device built on MduX-rust — which device(s) the QMS covers and which ISO 13485 requirements apply. Not a substitute for the QMS itself, and not field-aligned with any crates/mdux-governance/src/lib.rs type (mdux-governance has no organizational/QMS concept). See docs/iso13485/01-foundations-and-qms.md §4.2.2 and docs/governance/citation-convention.md.

role.description: The organization's role in the medical device supply chain, e.g. 'Manufacturer', 'Authorized representative', 'Importer'.

classification.description: The organization's regulatory device classification (jurisdiction-specific, e.g. EU MDR Class IIb, FDA Class II) — distinct from mdux_core::SafetyClass, which is an IEC 62304 software safety classification, not a device classification.

risk_class.description: Free text: the organization's own risk classification terminology for this device, if distinct from `classification`.

applicable_requirements.description: Clause references in the docs/governance/citation-convention.md format, e.g. 'ISO 13485:2016 §7.3 Design and development'.

exclusions.description: Clauses excluded from scope, with justification, per ISO 13485:2016 §4.2.2's quality-manual requirement to state exclusions and their justification.
